query_title: Gonzo: The Life and Work of Dr. Hunter S. Thompson

recommendations.title: Enron: The Smartest Guys in the Room
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the Enron corporation, its faulty and corrupt business practices, and how they led to its fall.

recommendations.title: Going Clear: Scientology and the Prison of Belief
recommendations.overview: GOING CLEAR intimately profiles eight former members of the Church of Scientology, shining a light on how they attract true believers and the things they do in the name of religion.

recommendations.title: Taxi to the Dark Side
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the torture practices of the United States in Afghanistan, Iraq and Guantanamo Bay, focusing on an innocent taxi driver in Afghanistan who was tortured and killed in 2002.

recommendations.title: The Armstrong Lie

recommendations.title: The Inventor: Out for Blood in Silicon Valley

recommendations.title: Freakonomics
recommendations.overview: Some of the world's most innovative documentary filmmakers will explore the hidden side of everything.
recommendations.director: Eugene Jarecki, Heidi Ewing, Alex Gibney, Morgan Spurlock, Seth Gordon, Rachel Grady

recommendations.title: Zero Days

recommendations.director: Joaquim Dos Santos, Kemp Powers, Justin K. Thompson

recommendations.title: We Steal Secrets: The Story of WikiLeaks
recommendations.overview: Julian Assange. Bradley Manning. Collateral murder. Cablegate. WikiLeaks. These people and terms have exploded into public consciousness by fundamentally changing the way democratic societies deal with privacy, secrecy, and the right to information,
